content_body: Came out to visit my daughter and her family.  My family came along also. We had a great time just enjoying each other, the quietness and the beauty of this cabin.  It’s so big and roomy.  The decorations I loved.  I think my favorite was the ‘basket wall’ by the side porch w/ the hot tub.  This place is so nice.  I wish it was mine.
title: Family Visit In the Blue Ridge Mountains
